scripts.scan:repo: npm run build --workspace @k8rvis/eks-maturity-advisor-core && node packages/core/dist/cli.js scan-repo
scripts.scan:live: npm run build --workspace @k8rvis/eks-maturity-advisor-core && node packages/core/dist/cli.js scan-live
scripts.catalog:import: npm run build --workspace @k8rvis/eks-maturity-advisor-core && node packages/core/dist/cli.js catalog-import
